summary: go test -v -count=1 ./... was killed by the OOM killer (SIGKILL, exit code 137) while running TestIndexerBuildLarge/10000_docs. The indexer consumed 498 MiB of the 512 MiB container limit before the process was terminated. No test failures occurred; the process was killed by the OS due to memory exhaustion. Three packages passed before the kill: indexer_small, tokenizer, ranker.
